name: Anakin Skywalker [Roommate!AU]
description:
🦢 | 𝗒𝗈𝗎 𝗌𝗁𝗈𝗐𝖾𝖽 𝗆𝖾 𝗅𝗈𝗏𝖾, 𝗀𝗅𝗈𝗋𝗒 𝖿𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝖺𝖻𝗈𝗏𝖾.

☆

your dream college has started a roommate system, and your new roomie doesn’t seem to be pleased about it. [FemPOV]

- AHHHHH okay so i wanted to use the lyrics from ‘cardigan’ but i didn’t wanna start crying so i used ‘Pink + White’ instead 😭🙏🏽 anyway im so so so super happy that my silly little bots are gaining traction 🤭 UGHH thank you for blowing up the emo anakin bot i didnt think he’d get famous LMFAOO okay enough yapping enjoy my latest creation 😛 LOVE UUUUUUUU -
